manifest.description: Project-based long-form writing environment for books and scripts.
manifest.name: Folio

name: Folio

releases.author: danigarvire
releases.description:
Add screenplay format flag and handling
Introduce a screenplay template flag and propagate screenplay formatting through the project/draft workflow. Adds a screenplay:true flag to default templates and preserves it when creating files from templates; BookService.createStructureFromTemplate now inherits draft/screenplay state and shouldUseScreenplayClass considers files inside the manuscript (inDraft) as screenplay for script/film projects. Adds draftNodeForFile to detect whether a path is in a draft, updates frontmatter generation to emit the md-screenplay cssclass, and exposes a Screenplay selector + badge in the template editor UI with accompanying CSS. Includes unit tests to validate screenplay assignment and related heuristics.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/danigarvire/Folio/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: danigarvire
releases.description:
# Folio 1.1.0 — Drafts, everywhere

This release turns "draft" into a real, first-class concept and puts your outline
strip in front of you no matter what you're working on.

## ✨ Drafts & the current draft
- A **draft** is now any folder *or* single file — a folder of chapters/episodes,
  or one screenplay/essay file. A project can hold **several drafts**.
- Exactly one is the **current draft**, and it drives the outline strip, beats and
  timeline. It shows a **CURRENT** badge in the tree; other drafts show a quiet dot.
- **Switch drafts** from the new dropdown in the strip toolbar, or right-click a
  draft → **Set as current draft**.
- Drafts live together on a **"Drafts" shelf** folder, keeping your project root tidy.

## 🎬 The outline strip, everywhere
- The strip now **follows the current draft across your whole project** — it no
  longer disappears when you open a character sheet or research note.
- The **playhead** lights up only when you're editing inside the current draft.
- **Beats are saved per draft**, so each draft keeps its own planning.
- New **file-view button** in the toolbar jumps straight to the draft's script,
  sitting between the split-view and beat-board buttons.

## 🗂️ Beat Board with strip
- The Beat Board opens standalone again and now **carries the outline strip at the
  top**, so you can see structure while you brainstorm cards.
- Fixed a bug where opening the board could **duplicate the strip/board** (no more
  needing to hit Refresh).

## 🔁 Two-way Outline ⇄ Draft
- **Build new draft from outline** now creates a **single file** for a one-section
  outline or a **folder** for several, drops it on the Drafts shelf, and makes it
  current — your original draft stays untouched.
- Both directions remain non-destructive.

## ⚙️ Templates
- Templates ship a **"Drafts" shelf** with the starting draft inside.
- The template editor's draft target can now be a **folder or a single file**.

## 📖 Help
- Updated Help (EN/ES) with new sections on Drafts, the outline strip, the Beat
  Board, and the two-way outline flow.

---
**Note:** To get the new "Drafts" shelf template structure, open Settings →
**Reset templates to defaults**. Existing projects keep working; your first edit
to a draft's beats migrates them automatically.

## What's Changed
* Audit by @danigarvire in https://github.com/danigarvire/Folio/pull/2


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/danigarvire/Folio/compare/1.0.6...1.1.0

releases.author: danigarvire
releases.description:
### Bug fixes
- Fixed crash in Switch Project modal (setIcon not imported)
- Fixed ESM/CJS module system across all modals
- Fixed daily word count accumulation inflating stats
- Fixed cover image binary write corruption
- Added debounce to vault events on project creation
- Added versions.json for Community Plugins submission

releases.author: danigarvire
releases.description:
**### Folio v1.0.5**

**Improvements**

- Added funding links to the plugin manifest (GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee).
- Improved plugin data persistence by relying on Obsidian’s native loadData / saveData system.

**Maintenance**

- Cleaned repository artifacts and removed accidental macOS metadata files.
- Ensured plugin state files (data.json) are not tracked in the repository.

**_No functional changes to the writing workflow._**

1.0.1 — Metadata and validation fixes.

- Add required isDesktopOnly flag

Notes:

releases.author: danigarvire
releases.description:
Initial public release of Folio.

Included:
- Project-based writing workspace (books / screenplays / series)
- Outline tree with reordering and context actions
- Writer Tools: Characters, Narrative, Structure, Tips
- Focus Mode with session stats
- Screenplay formatting via cssclass (md-screenplay / folio-screenplay)
- PDF export

Notes:
- Folio is provided "as is" without warranty. Please keep vault backups.
